name: on transmit_unsubscribe
title: on transmit_unsubscribe
description: This handler is called whenever a consumed data, event, or field member transmits an unsubscribe via the CAPL binding.
If the member does not use the CAPL binding, the handler is ignored.
If there are multiple handlers for the same member, the measurement will be aborted.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
